SourceCache.title: SourceCache
SourceCache.description: Cached PDF page or text source details for quick telegram retrieval

text.description: The page or paragraph text content

book.description: Name of the religious book source

imageUrl.description: Google Cloud Storage screenshot preview URL

GroupCache.title: GroupCache
GroupCache.description: Information on a set of sources representing a citation group

sources.description: Array of referenced source cache objects

User.title: User
User.description: A user index container documented by Telegram chat/user ID

id.description: Telegram user or group chat ID

Topic.title: Topic
Topic.description: Active thread or topic of communication

renamed.description: Flag showing if thread topic was updated/renamed

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this topic was updated

Message.title: Message
Message.description: Individual message in the thread history

timestamp.description: Time the message was sent or processed

msgId.description: Optional message ID assigned by Telegram

replyToMsgId.description: Optional message ID being replied to

LatestSources.title: LatestSources
LatestSources.description: Recent RAG citation sources associated with active replies

sourceCache.description: Cache collection for matching telegram item links

groupCache.description: Cached citation sets for grouped queries

users.description: Root collection representing user chat containers

users/{chatId}/topics.description: Subcollection under user containing active chat threads/topics

users/{chatId}/topics/{threadStr}/messag.description: Nested chat history of individual messages for RAG context
